subject: [PATCH v2 6/9] mm: percpu: per-node kmem accounting

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch introduces per-node kmem accounting for percpu allocations. It decouples the memcg charging from kmem accounting, allowing the post-alloc hook to account pages on their actual node rather than just the best-effort placement node. The patch also optimizes the accounting process by batching per node instead of per page, reducing the number of memcg work operations proportional to the number of nodes. Additionally, it precharges enough pages to cover the worst-case scenario where the allocation spans all nodes, ensuring that the per-node credit never runs short.
